title: 2019 Press Releases
summary: This is a Federal Reserve website index page listing press releases from calendar year 2019, not a single document or article. The page contains links to dozens of distinct announcements spanning multiple categories including FOMC statements, regulatory actions, enforcement actions, banking applications, and research publications. The content is from 2019 and is therefore a historical record from over 6 years ago.
key_points: This is a listing/index page containing links to multiple press releases, not a single source document
Contains FOMC statement releases from 12/11/2019 and 10/30/2019 (but links not captured in full)
Contains discount rate meeting minutes from multiple dates
Contains numerous regulatory, enforcement, and administrative announcements
why_it_matters: This listing page cannot serve as a reliable single source for research purposes. Individual press releases referenced here would need to be accessed separately. The page's value is navigational rather than substantive.
notes: NON-ARCHIVABLE: This is a listing page containing an index of 2019 Federal Reserve press releases. Cannot be treated as a single source. Individual items (FOMC statements 12/11/2019, 10/30/2019; FOMC minutes 11/20/2019; economic projections 12/11/2019) would need to be retrieved as separate documents. The source metadata identifies the topic as macro catalysts, and while some items on this page relate to that topic, the page itself is not a coherent source. Historical record from 2019.
